checklist.question: Uses notion-cli (not WebFetch/browser) for all Notion operations
Correctly extracts page ID from Notion URL (32-char hex, ignoring query params)
Runs notion-cli from its install directory (e.g. cd <notion-cli-dir> && uv run notion)
Defaults to partial update (block list + delete + append) instead of full rewrite unless explicitly requested
Writes content to temp file before passing to page update/append/create --file
Respects user's language for content (does not auto-switch to English)
Handles known limitations: table rendering issues, large page truncation, unsupported block types
